summary: Implemented a bounded Site-local MCP role-policy reconciler for config.json. It compares the architect narada-proper allowed_tools subtree to the canonical MCP role-policy projection, reports exact drift in read-only mode, supports explicit apply repair, and records portable mutation evidence for applied local config changes.

verification.result: initially reported stale site_registry_relation_plan_transition; after explicit apply, passed with status ok and no additions/removals

residuals: The repository has extensive pre-existing dirty and untracked files unrelated to this task.
